chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1635 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel under instruction does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, same is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
